languages.text: "Да. Впервые за долгое время мой разум абсолютно ясен. Я не сожалею о содеянном. Нунциус наконец-то свободен от скверны, и я рад, что мне хватило духа умертвить его самому. Я познал горький опыт, который не дерзну забыть, но если моя память начнет гаснуть, у меня всегда будет напоминание о том, к чему ведет отступление от догмы". {n}Эоганн печально смотрит на голову Нунциуса.{/n}

"Yes. For the first time in a long time, my mind is completely clear. I have no regrets about what I have done. Nuncius is free of corruption at last, and I am pleased that I had the fortitude to end his life myself. I have learned a harsh lesson that I will not dare to forget, but should my memory begin to fade, I will always have a reminder of what deviation from dogma leads to." {n}Eogunn looks mournfully at Nuncius's head.{/n}

Я познал горький опыт, который не дерзну забыть, но если моя память начнет гаснуть, у меня всегда будет напоминание о том, к чему ведет отступление от догмы". {n}Эоганн печально смотрит на голову Нунциуса.{/n}

I have learned a harsh lesson that I will not dare to forget, but should my memory begin to fade, I will always have a reminder of what deviation from dogma leads to." {n}Eogunn looks mournfully at Nuncius's head.{/n}

languages.text: «Sí. Mi mente está despejada por primera vez en mucho tiempo. No lamento nada de lo que he hecho. Nuncius se ha liberado al fin de la corrupción, y me congratula haber tenido la fortaleza de ánimo necesaria para poner fin a su vida yo mismo. He aprendido una dura lección que no pretendo olvidar, y aunque mi memoria flaquee, siempre me quedará este recuerdo de lo que sucede cuando uno se aparta del dogma», {n}concluye Eogunn mirando apenado la cabeza de Nuncius.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. For the first time in a long time, my mind is completely clear. I have no regrets about what I have done. Nuncius is free of corruption at last, and I am pleased that I had the fortitude to end his life myself. I have learned a harsh lesson that I will not dare to forget, but should my memory begin to fade, I will always have a reminder of what deviation from dogma leads to." {n}Eogunn looks mournfully at Nuncius's head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Sí. Mi mente está despejada por primera vez en mucho tiempo. No lamento nada de lo que he hecho. Nuncius se ha liberado al fin de la corrupción, y me congratula haber tenido la fortaleza de ánimo necesaria para poner fin a su vida yo mismo. He aprendido una dura lección que no pretendo olvidar, y aunque mi memoria flaquee, siempre me quedará este recuerdo de lo que sucede cuando uno se aparta del dogma», {n}concluye Eogunn mirando apenado la cabeza de Nuncius.{/n}

languages.text: “我很好。这么久了，我的思绪第一次如此清明。我对自己的所作所为没有任何后悔。努恩修斯终于摆脱了腐化，而我也庆幸自己有勇气亲手终结他的生命。我学到了一个残酷的教训，我绝不敢忘。即便有一天记忆开始模糊，我也会让自己永远记住，偏离教条会带来什么后果。”{n}伊奥贡悲伤地看着努恩修斯的头颅。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. For the first time in a long time, my mind is completely clear. I have no regrets about what I have done. Nuncius is free of corruption at last, and I am pleased that I had the fortitude to end his life myself. I have learned a harsh lesson that I will not dare to forget, but should my memory begin to fade, I will always have a reminder of what deviation from dogma leads to." {n}Eogunn looks mournfully at Nuncius's head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我很好。这么久了，我的思绪第一次如此清明。我对自己的所作所为没有任何后悔。努恩修斯终于摆脱了腐化，而我也庆幸自己有勇气亲手终结他的生命。我学到了一个残酷的教训，我绝不敢忘。即便有一天记忆开始模糊，我也会让自己永远记住，偏离教条会带来什么后果。”{n}伊奥贡悲伤地看着努恩修斯的头颅。{/n}

languages.text: « Oui. Pour la première fois depuis bien longtemps, mon esprit est parfaitement clair. Je ne regrette aucunement ce que j'ai fait. Nuncius est enfin libéré de la corruption et je me félicite d'avoir eu le courage de mettre fin à sa vie de mes mains. J'ai appris une cruelle leçon que je n'oserai jamais oublier, mais si ma mémoire commence un jour à faillir, j'aurai toujours un rappel de ce qui arrive lorsque l'on dévie du dogme, » {n}déclare-t-il en lançant un regard mélancolique à la tête de Nuncius.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. For the first time in a long time, my mind is completely clear. I have no regrets about what I have done. Nuncius is free of corruption at last, and I am pleased that I had the fortitude to end his life myself. I have learned a harsh lesson that I will not dare to forget, but should my memory begin to fade, I will always have a reminder of what deviation from dogma leads to." {n}Eogunn looks mournfully at Nuncius's head.{/n}

Nuncius est enfin libéré de la corruption et je me félicite d'avoir eu le courage de mettre fin à sa vie de mes mains. J'ai appris une cruelle leçon que je n'oserai jamais oublier, mais si ma mémoire commence un jour à faillir, j'aurai toujours un rappel de ce qui arrive lorsque l'on dévie du dogme, » {n}déclare-t-il en lançant un regard mélancolique à la tête de Nuncius.{/n}

languages.text: "Evet. Uzun zamandır ilk kez zihnim tamamen berrak. Yaptığım şeyden hiç pişmanlık duymuyorum. Nuncius sonunda yozlaşmadan kurtuldu ve onun hayatına kendi ellerimle son verme dirayetini gösterdiğim için memnunum. Unutmaya cüret edemeyeceğim ağır bir ders aldım. Fakat hafızam solmaya başlarsa dogmadan sapmanın nelere yol açtığını bana daima hatırlatacak bir ders bu." {n}Eogunn, Nuncius'un kafasına kederle bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. For the first time in a long time, my mind is completely clear. I have no regrets about what I have done. Nuncius is free of corruption at last, and I am pleased that I had the fortitude to end his life myself. I have learned a harsh lesson that I will not dare to forget, but should my memory begin to fade, I will always have a reminder of what deviation from dogma leads to." {n}Eogunn looks mournfully at Nuncius's head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Evet. Uzun zamandır ilk kez zihnim tamamen berrak. Yaptığım şeyden hiç pişmanlık duymuyorum. Nuncius sonunda yozlaşmadan kurtuldu ve onun hayatına kendi ellerimle son verme dirayetini gösterdiğim için memnunum. Unutmaya cüret edemeyeceğim ağır bir ders aldım. Fakat hafızam solmaya başlarsa dogmadan sapmanın nelere yol açtığını bana daima hatırlatacak bir ders bu." {n}Eogunn, Nuncius'un kafasına kederle bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ja. Zum ersten Mal seit langer Zeit ist mein Verstand völlig klar. Ich bedauere nicht, was ich getan habe. Nuncius wurde endlich von der Verderbnis befreit, und ich freue mich, dass ich den Mut hatte, sein Leben selbst zu beenden. Ich habe eine harte Lektion gelernt, die ich nie mehr vergessen werde, aber sollten meine Erinnerungen erneut verblassen, wird mir stets im Gedächtnis bleiben, wohin eine Abweichung vom Dogma führt." {n}Eogunn betrachtet traurig Nuncius' Kopf.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. For the first time in a long time, my mind is completely clear. I have no regrets about what I have done. Nuncius is free of corruption at last, and I am pleased that I had the fortitude to end his life myself. I have learned a harsh lesson that I will not dare to forget, but should my memory begin to fade, I will always have a reminder of what deviation from dogma leads to." {n}Eogunn looks mournfully at Nuncius's head.{/n}

Ich habe eine harte Lektion gelernt, die ich nie mehr vergessen werde, aber sollten meine Erinnerungen erneut verblassen, wird mir stets im Gedächtnis bleiben, wohin eine Abweichung vom Dogma führt." {n}Eogunn betrachtet traurig Nuncius' Kopf.{/n}

languages.text: 「ええ。久方ぶりに、私の精神は完全に澄み渡っています。なしたことに、悔いはありません。ヌンキウスはついに腐敗から解放され、私は自らの手で彼の生を終わらせる剛胆さを持てたことを、喜ばしく思います。私は、決して忘れまいと心に誓う、厳しい教訓を学びました。しかし、もし私の記憶が薄れ始めたなら、教義からの逸脱が何を招くかを思い出させてくれるものが、常に私の手元にあるのです」{n}エオガンは、ヌンキウスの頭を悼ましげに見やる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes. For the first time in a long time, my mind is completely clear. I have no regrets about what I have done. Nuncius is free of corruption at last, and I am pleased that I had the fortitude to end his life myself. I have learned a harsh lesson that I will not dare to forget, but should my memory begin to fade, I will always have a reminder of what deviation from dogma leads to." {n}Eogunn looks mournfully at Nuncius's head.{/n}
